controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the direction with immediate effect
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 35A of the Banking
Regulation Act, 1949, Section 45L read with 45M of the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934,
sub-section (1) of Section 11 of Credit Information Companies (Regulation) Act, 2005 and
Section 18 of the Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007, the Reserve Bank of India,
being satisfied that it is necessary and expedient in public interest to do so, hereby directs
that all the regulated entities as indicated in Clause 4 of the Master Direction shall comply
with the Direction with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the direction with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to hold office till the expiry of their tenure
controls.control_description:
(i) The Internal Ombudsman appointed by the regulated entity, under the erstwhile
Internal Ombudsman Schemes / Direction shall continue to hold office till the expiry
of their tenure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to hold office till the expiry of their tenure

controls.control_objective: To ensure closely monitor their eligibility as per the prescribed provisions for timely appointment of internal ombudsman in their entity, as required
controls.control_description:
(ii) The regulated entities not currently falling under the Internal Ombudsman
Schemes / Direction may closely monitor their eligibility as per the prescribed
provisions for timely appointment of Internal Ombudsman in their entity, as
required.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to closely monitor their eligibility as per the prescribed provisions for timely appointment of internal ombudsman in their entity, as required

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (internal ombudsman) directions, 2023
controls.control_description:
Short Title and Commencement
(1) These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Internal Ombudsman)
Directions, 2023.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (internal ombudsman) directions, 2023

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect from december 29, 2023 and shall apply to the whole of india
controls.control_description:
(2) These Directions shall come into effect from December 29, 2023 and shall apply to
the whole of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect from december 29, 2023 and shall apply to the whole of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure , by an order, suspend for such period as may be specified in the order, the operation of any or all of the provisions of these directions, either gen
controls.control_description:
Suspension
(1) The Reserve Bank, if it is satisfied that it is expedient to do so, may, by an order,
suspend for such period as may be specified in the order, the operation of any or all of
the provisions of these Directions, either generally or in relation to any specified regulated
entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , by an order, suspend for such period as may be specified in the order, the operation of any or all of the provisions of these directions, either gen

controls.control_objective: To ensure by an order, extend from time to time, the period of any suspension ordered as aforesaid by such period, as it may deem fit
controls.control_description:
(2) The Reserve Bank may by an order, extend from time to time, the period of any
suspension ordered as aforesaid by such period, as it may deem fit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to by an order, extend from time to time, the period of any suspension ordered as aforesaid by such period, as it may deem fit

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them as below:
controls.control_description:
Definitions
(1) In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear
the meanings assigned to them as below:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them as below:

controls.control_objective: To ensure a 'banking company', a 'corresponding new bank' and 'state bank of india' as defined in section 5 of the banking regulation act, 1949 (act 10 of 1949)
controls.control_description:
(a) "Bank" means a 'banking company', a 'corresponding new bank' and 'State
Bank of India' as defined in Section 5 of the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 (Act 10
of 1949) that are included in the Second Schedule of the Reserve Bank of India
Act, 1934 (Act 2 of 1934), but does not include a bank in resolution or winding up
or under directions or any other bank as specified by the Reserve Bank;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a 'banking company', a 'corresponding new bank' and 'state bank of india' as defined in section 5 of the banking regulation act, 1949 (act 10 of 1949)

controls.control_objective: To ensure executive director in-charge of customer service for banks, executive director / managing director / chief executive officer for non- banking financia
controls.control_description:
(c) "Competent Authority" means Executive Director In-charge of customer service
for banks, Executive Director / Managing Director / Chief Executive Officer for Non-
Banking Financial Companies, Managing Director / Chief Executive Officer for
Non-bank System Participants, and Managing Director / Chief Executive Officer
for Credit Information Companies;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to executive director in-charge of customer service for banks, executive director / managing director / chief executive officer for non- banking financia

controls.control_objective: To ensure a representation in writing or through other modes alleging deficiency in service on the part of the regulated entity and seeking relief thereon
controls.control_description:
(d) "Complaint" means a representation in writing or through other modes alleging
deficiency in service on the part of the regulated entity and seeking relief thereon;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a representation in writing or through other modes alleging deficiency in service on the part of the regulated entity and seeking relief thereon

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company as defined in the companies act, 2013 (18 of 2013) and has been granted a certificate of registration under sub-section (2) of section 5 of
controls.control_description:
(e) "Credit Information Company (CIC)" means a company as defined in the
Companies Act, 2013 (18 of 2013) and has been granted a certificate of
registration under sub-section (2) of section 5 of the Credit Information Companies
(Regulation) Act, 2005 (30 of 2005);
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company as defined in the companies act, 2013 (18 of 2013) and has been granted a certificate of registration under sub-section (2) of section 5 of

controls.control_objective: To ensure to provide statutorily or otherwise, which may or may not result in financial loss or damage to the customer
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to provide statutorily or otherwise, which may or may not result in financial loss or damage to the customer

controls.control_objective: To ensure any person appointed under clause 6 of these directions
controls.control_description:
(g) "Deputy Internal Ombudsman" means any person appointed under clause 6 of
these Directions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any person appointed under clause 6 of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure regulatory body for financial sector entities and includes:
controls.control_description:
(h) "Financial Sector Regulatory Body" means regulatory body for financial sector
entities and includes:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to regulatory body for financial sector entities and includes:

controls.control_objective: To ensure any person appointed under clause 5 of these directions
controls.control_description:
(i) "Internal Ombudsman" means any person appointed under clause 5 of these
Directions;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any person appointed under clause 5 of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure an nbfc as defined in section 45-i (f) of the reserve bank of india act, 1934 and registered with the reserve bank
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an nbfc as defined in section 45-i (f) of the reserve bank of india act, 1934 and registered with the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure any person other than a bank participating in a payment system as defined under section 2 of the payment and settlement systems act, 2007 including a
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to any person other than a bank participating in a payment system as defined under section 2 of the payment and settlement systems act, 2007 including a

controls.control_objective: To ensure a system that enables payment to be effected between a payer and a beneficiary, involving clearing, payment or settlement service or all of them, but
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a system that enables payment to be effected between a payer and a beneficiary, involving clearing, payment or settlement service or all of them, but

controls.control_objective: To ensure and includes a person who operates an authorised payment system as defined under section 2 of the payment and settlement systems act, 2007
controls.control_description: 1 'System Provider' means and includes a person who operates an authorised payment system as defined under Section 2 of the Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to and includes a person who operates an authorised payment system as defined under section 2 of the payment and settlement systems act, 2007

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specified by the reserve bank from time to time
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specified by the reserve bank from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure include related party as defined in sub-clause 76 of section 2 of the companies act, 2013 and related party as per the applicable accounting standards
controls.control_description:
(n) "Related Party" shall include related party as defined in sub-clause 76 of section
2 of the Companies Act, 2013 and related party as per the applicable accounting
standards.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include related party as defined in sub-clause 76 of section 2 of the companies act, 2013 and related party as per the applicable accounting standards

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949, the reserve bank of india act, 1934, the payment and settlement syst
controls.control_description:
(2) All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as
assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949, the Reserve Bank of India
Act, 1934, the Payment and Settlement Systems Act, 2007, the Credit Information
Companies (Regulation) Act, 2005, the Credit Information Companies Rules, 2006, the
Credit Information Companies Regulations, 2006, or the Reserve Bank - Integrated
Ombudsman Scheme (RB-IOS), 2021 or regulations, directions and guidelines issued
by the Reserve Bank of India.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949, the reserve bank of india act, 1934, the payment and settlement syst

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to
controls.control_description:
Applicability
(1) These Directions shall apply to
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be applicable even if the number of pre-paid payment instruments outstanding falls below the threshold at a later date
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to continue to be applicable even if the number of pre-paid payment instruments outstanding falls below the threshold at a later date

controls.control_objective: To ensure come under the ambit of these directions and hence would be required to put in place an internal ombudsman framework within six months of reaching the
controls.control_description:
(2) Any regulated entity, subsequent to the issue of these Directions, reaching the
threshold/s prescribed under clause 4(1) shall come under the ambit of these
Directions and hence would be required to put in place an Internal Ombudsman
framework within six months of reaching the threshold.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to come under the ambit of these directions and hence would be required to put in place an internal ombudsman framework within six months of reaching the

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to that regulated entity
controls.control_description:
(3) The Reserve Bank, if it is satisfied in public interest, may, by order, direct any
regulated entity to appoint an Internal Ombudsman and these directions shall apply to
that regulated entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to that regulated entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure appoint the internal ombudsman after satisfying themselves that the following prerequisites are fulfilled for the appointment of internal ombudsman:
controls.control_description:
Appointment of Internal Ombudsman
(1) Regulated entity shall appoint the Internal Ombudsman after satisfying themselves
that the following prerequisites are fulfilled for the appointment of Internal Ombudsman:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appoint the internal ombudsman after satisfying themselves that the following prerequisites are fulfilled for the appointment of internal ombudsman:

controls.control_objective: To ensure either be a retired or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a general manager of another bank / financial sector regulatory body / nbsp / nbfc /
controls.control_description:
(a) The Internal Ombudsman shall either be a retired or serving officer, in the rank
equivalent to a General Manager of another bank / Financial Sector Regulatory Body
/ NBSP / NBFC / CIC, having necessary skills and experience of minimum seven
years of working in areas such as banking, non-banking finance, regulation,
supervision, payment and settlement systems, credit information or consumer
protection;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to either be a retired or serving officer, in the rank equivalent to a general manager of another bank / financial sector regulatory body / nbsp / nbfc /

controls.control_objective: To ensure previously not have been employed, nor presently be employed, by the regulated entity or the regulated entity's related parties
controls.control_description:
(b) The Internal Ombudsman shall previously not have been employed, nor
presently be employed, by the regulated entity or the regulated entity's related
parties.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to previously not have been employed, nor presently be employed, by the regulated entity or the regulated entity's related parties

controls.control_objective: To ensure be over 70 years of age before the completion of the tenure
controls.control_description:
(2) The Internal Ombudsman shall not be over 70 years of age before the completion of
the tenure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be over 70 years of age before the completion of the tenure

controls.control_objective: To ensure appoint more than one internal ombudsman depending on the volume of complaints received by them to ensure continuity of operations during the absence
controls.control_description:
(3) Regulated entity may appoint more than one Internal Ombudsman depending on the
volume of complaints received by them to ensure continuity of operations during the
absence of the Internal Ombudsman.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appoint more than one internal ombudsman depending on the volume of complaints received by them to ensure continuity of operations during the absence

controls.control_objective: To ensure consider the need for diversity of experience of the incumbents to deal with different types of cases
controls.control_description:
While appointing additional Internal Ombudsman,
the regulated entity shall consider the need for diversity of experience of the incumbents
to deal with different types of cases.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to consider the need for diversity of experience of the incumbents to deal with different types of cases

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly define the jurisdiction of each internal ombudsman
controls.control_description:
In such cases, the regulated entity may clearly define
the jurisdiction of each Internal Ombudsman.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly define the jurisdiction of each internal ombudsman

controls.control_objective: To ensure appoint one or more deputy internal ombudsman depending on the volume of complaints received by them, who would assist the internal ombudsman in the q
controls.control_description:
Appointment of Deputy Internal Ombudsman
(1) Regulated entity may appoint one or more Deputy Internal Ombudsman depending
on the volume of complaints received by them, who would assist the Internal Ombudsman
in the quality disposal of the complaints.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appoint one or more deputy internal ombudsman depending on the volume of complaints received by them, who would assist the internal ombudsman in the q

controls.control_objective: To ensure either be a retired or serving officer, not below the rank of deputy general manager of another bank / financial sector regulatory body / nbsp / nbfc
controls.control_description:
(2) The Deputy Internal Ombudsman shall either be a retired or serving officer, not below
the rank of Deputy General Manager of another bank / Financial Sector Regulatory Body
/ NBSP / NBFC / CIC, having necessary skills and experience of minimum five years of
working in areas such as banking, non-banking finance, regulation, supervision, payment
and settlement systems, credit information or consumer protection.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to either be a retired or serving officer, not below the rank of deputy general manager of another bank / financial sector regulatory body / nbsp / nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure be over 70 years of age before the completion of the tenure
controls.control_description:
(3) The Deputy Internal Ombudsman shall not be over 70 years of age before the
completion of the tenure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be over 70 years of age before the completion of the tenure

controls.control_objective: To ensure functionally report to the internal ombudsman, who will be the final authority / decision-making authority while dealing with the complaints
controls.control_description:
(4) The Deputy Internal Ombudsman shall functionally report to the Internal Ombudsman,
who will be the final authority / decision-making authority while dealing with the
complaints.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to functionally report to the internal ombudsman, who will be the final authority / decision-making authority while dealing with the complaints

controls.control_objective: To ensure function as the internal ombudsman for the limited purpose of reviewing the rejected complaints
controls.control_description:
In the temporary absence of the Internal Ombudsman, not exceeding a period
of 15 working days, the Deputy Internal Ombudsman may function as the Internal
Ombudsman for the limited purpose of reviewing the rejected complaints.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to function as the internal ombudsman for the limited purpose of reviewing the rejected complaints

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided to consumer education and protection department, central office, reserve bank of india (iocepd@rbi
controls.control_description:
Prior
information shall be provided to Consumer Education and Protection Department, Central
Office, Reserve Bank of India (iocepd@rbi.org.in) in case of temporary absence of the
Internal Ombudsman exceeding 15 working days, advising inter-alia, details of alternate
arrangements being put in place.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided to consumer education and protection department, central office, reserve bank of india (iocepd@rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 30 days
controls.control_description:
However, such temporary absence should not exceed
30 days.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 30 days

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a fixed term of not less than three years, but not exceeding five years
controls.control_description:
The tenure of the Internal Ombudsman /
Deputy Internal Ombudsman in the regulated entity shall be a fixed term of not less than
three years, but not exceeding five years.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a fixed term of not less than three years, but not exceeding five years

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for reappointment or for extension of term in the same regulated entity
controls.control_description:
(2) The Internal Ombudsman / Deputy Internal Ombudsman shall not be eligible for
reappointment or for extension of term in the same regulated entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for reappointment or for extension of term in the same regulated entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be indicated in the appointment letter
controls.control_description:
The tenure of the
Internal Ombudsman / Deputy Internal Ombudsman shall be indicated in the appointment
letter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be indicated in the appointment letter

controls.control_objective: To ensure inform reserve bank of india within 10 working days from the date of such vacancy
controls.control_description:
In case the vacancy arises on account of reasons beyond the control of
the regulated entity (such as death, resignation, incapacitation, terminal illness, etc.), the
regulated entity shall inform Reserve Bank of India within 10 working days from the date
of such vacancy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inform reserve bank of india within 10 working days from the date of such vacancy

controls.control_objective: To ensure appoint a new internal ombudsman / deputy internal ombudsman as per eligibility criteria specified under clause 5 and clause 6 of these directions wit
controls.control_description:
The regulated entity shall appoint a new Internal Ombudsman / Deputy
Internal Ombudsman as per eligibility criteria specified under clause 5 and clause 6 of
these Directions within three months from the date of vacancy and submit a report within
5 working days from the date of appointment of the new Internal Ombudsman / Deputy
Internal Ombudsman as per clause 15 of Chapter V of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to appoint a new internal ombudsman / deputy internal ombudsman as per eligibility criteria specified under clause 5 and clause 6 of these directions wit

controls.control_objective: To ensure act as internal ombudsman / deputy internal ombudsman or vice versa, even during the temporary absence of either
controls.control_description:
(4) The Principal Nodal Officer or the Nodal Officer, liaising with the offices of the RBI
Ombudsman, shall not act as Internal Ombudsman / Deputy Internal Ombudsman or vice
versa, even during the temporary absence of either.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to act as internal ombudsman / deputy internal ombudsman or vice versa, even during the temporary absence of either

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the post of the internal ombudsman does not remain vacant at any point of time
controls.control_description:
(5) The regulated entity shall ensure that the post of the Internal Ombudsman does not
remain vacant at any point of time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the post of the internal ombudsman does not remain vacant at any point of time

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake the process of fresh appointment well in advance to fill the vacancy before the expiry of the tenure of the incumbent internal ombudsman and
controls.control_description:
The regulated entity shall undertake the process of
fresh appointment well in advance to fill the vacancy before the expiry of the tenure of the
incumbent Internal Ombudsman and ensure that there is a minimum overlap of at least
one month between the time of demitting of office of the outgoing Internal Ombudsman
and the incoming Internal Ombudsman.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake the process of fresh appointment well in advance to fill the vacancy before the expiry of the tenure of the incumbent internal ombudsman and

controls.control_objective: To ensure undertake the process of fresh appointment at least three months before the expiry of the term of the incumbent internal ombudsman
controls.control_description:
The regulated entity shall undertake the process
of fresh appointment at least three months before the expiry of the term of the incumbent
Internal Ombudsman.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to undertake the process of fresh appointment at least three months before the expiry of the term of the incumbent internal ombudsman

controls.control_objective: To ensure report to the competent authority, as defined under clause 3(1)(c) of the directions, of the regulated entity administratively, and to the board of re
controls.control_description:
Administrative Oversight
(1) The Internal Ombudsman shall report to the Competent Authority, as defined under
clause 3(1)(c) of the Directions, of the regulated entity administratively, and to the Board
of regulated entity functionally.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report to the competent authority, as defined under clause 3(1)(c) of the directions, of the regulated entity administratively, and to the board of re

controls.control_objective: To ensure depute such number of its officers or other staff to the office of the internal ombudsman as is considered necessary for the smooth functioning of the
controls.control_description:
Secretariat and Cost of the office of Internal Ombudsman
(1) The regulated entity shall depute such number of its officers or other staff to the office
of the Internal Ombudsman as is considered necessary for the smooth functioning of the
offices of the Internal Ombudsman.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to depute such number of its officers or other staff to the office of the internal ombudsman as is considered necessary for the smooth functioning of the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made available to the office of the internal ombudsman to enable the internal ombudsman discharge his / her responsibilities effectively and effici
controls.control_description:
All other requisite office infrastructure, including
information technology support shall be made available to the office of the Internal
Ombudsman to enable the Internal Ombudsman discharge his / her responsibilities
effectively and efficiently.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made available to the office of the internal ombudsman to enable the internal ombudsman discharge his / her responsibilities effectively and effici

controls.control_objective: To ensure determine the structure of emoluments, facilities and benefits accorded to the internal ombudsman / deputy internal ombudsman, which should be appropr
controls.control_description:
(2) Customer Service Committee / Consumer Protection Committee of the Board of the
regulated entity shall determine the structure of emoluments, facilities and benefits
accorded to the Internal Ombudsman / Deputy Internal Ombudsman, which should be
appropriate keeping in view the stature and position of the Internal Ombudsman / Deputy
Internal Ombudsman being at the apex of the grievance redress mechanism of the
regulated entity as also the need to attract experienced persons with requisite expertise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to determine the structure of emoluments, facilities and benefits accorded to the internal ombudsman / deputy internal ombudsman, which should be appropr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be changed during the tenure of internal ombudsman / deputy internal ombudsman
controls.control_description:
These emoluments, facilities and benefits accorded to the Internal Ombudsman / Deputy
Internal Ombudsman, once determined, shall not be changed during the tenure of Internal
Ombudsman / Deputy Internal Ombudsman.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be changed during the tenure of internal ombudsman / deputy internal ombudsman

controls.control_objective: To ensure preferably be placed in the head office or corporate office of the regulated entity
controls.control_description:
(3) The office of the Internal Ombudsman shall preferably be placed in the Head Office
or Corporate Office of the regulated entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to preferably be placed in the head office or corporate office of the regulated entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct an internal audit of the implementation of these directions on a yearly basis
controls.control_description:
Internal Audit
(1) The regulated entity shall conduct an internal audit of the implementation of these
Directions on a yearly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct an internal audit of the implementation of these directions on a yearly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure cover the implementation and compliance with these directions inter-alia, including:
controls.control_description:
The internal audit of the regulated entity shall cover the
implementation and compliance with these Directions inter-alia, including:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to cover the implementation and compliance with these directions inter-alia, including:

controls.control_objective: To ensure exclude any assessment of the correctness of decisions taken by the internal ombudsman
controls.control_description:
(2) The scope of the internal audit shall exclude any assessment of the correctness of
decisions taken by the Internal Ombudsman.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exclude any assessment of the correctness of decisions taken by the internal ombudsman

controls.control_objective: To ensure handle complaints received directly from the complainants or members of the public but deal with the complaints that have already been examined by the
controls.control_description:
Role and Responsibilities of Internal Ombudsman
(1) The Internal Ombudsman shall not handle complaints received directly from the
complainants or members of the public but deal with the complaints that have already
been examined by the regulated entity but have been partly or wholly rejected by the
regulated entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to handle complaints received directly from the complainants or members of the public but deal with the complaints that have already been examined by the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be handled by the internal ombudsman:
controls.control_description:
(2) The following types of complaints shall be outside the purview of these Directions and
shall not be handled by the Internal Ombudsman:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be handled by the internal ombudsman:

controls.control_objective: To ensure forward all rejected / partially rejected complaints under the categories (a) and (b) above to the internal ombudsman/s
controls.control_description:
The regulated entity shall forward all rejected / partially rejected complaints under the
categories (a) and (b) above to the Internal Ombudsman/s.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to forward all rejected / partially rejected complaints under the categories (a) and (b) above to the internal ombudsman/s

controls.control_objective: To ensure look for inherent deficiency in service in such cases and take a view whether any of these complaints can be exempted under (a) and / or (b) above as
controls.control_description:
The Internal Ombudsman
shall look for inherent deficiency in service in such cases and take a view whether any of
these complaints can be exempted under (a) and / or (b) above as decided by the
regulated entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to look for inherent deficiency in service in such cases and take a view whether any of these complaints can be exempted under (a) and / or (b) above as

controls.control_objective: To ensure be immediately referred back to the regulated entity by the internal ombudsman
controls.control_description:
(3) Complaints that are outside the purview of these Directions shall be immediately
referred back to the regulated entity by the Internal Ombudsman.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be immediately referred back to the regulated entity by the internal ombudsman

controls.control_objective: To ensure analyse the pattern of complaints such as product / category wise, consumer group wise, geographical location wise, etc
controls.control_description:
(4) The Internal Ombudsman shall analyse the pattern of complaints such as product /
category wise, consumer group wise, geographical location wise, etc., and suggest
means for taking actions to address the root cause of complaints of similar / repeat nature
and those that require policy level changes in the regulated entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to analyse the pattern of complaints such as product / category wise, consumer group wise, geographical location wise, etc

controls.control_objective: To ensure examine the complaints based on records available with the regulated entity, including any documents submitted by the complainant and comments or clar
controls.control_description:
The Internal
Ombudsman shall examine the complaints based on records available with the regulated
entity, including any documents submitted by the complainant and comments or
clarifications furnished by the regulated entity to the specific queries of the Internal
Ombudsman.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to examine the complaints based on records available with the regulated entity, including any documents submitted by the complainant and comments or clar

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek additional information and documents from the complainant, through the regulated entity
controls.control_description:
The Internal Ombudsman may seek additional information and documents
from the complainant, through the regulated entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek additional information and documents from the complainant, through the regulated entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek additional information from the concerned credit institution/s (ci) through cic
controls.control_description:
In the case of CICs, the Internal
Ombudsman may seek additional information from the concerned Credit Institution/s (CI)
through CIC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek additional information from the concerned credit institution/s (ci) through cic

controls.control_objective: To ensure record a "reasoned decision" in each case
controls.control_description: The Internal Ombudsman must record a "reasoned decision" in each case.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to record a "reasoned decision" in each case

controls.control_objective: To ensure hold meetings with the concerned functionaries of the regulated entity and seek any record / document available with the regulated entity that are nec
controls.control_description:
(5) The Internal Ombudsman may hold meetings with the concerned functionaries of the
regulated entity and seek any record / document available with the regulated entity that
are necessary for examining the complaint and reviewing the decision.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to hold meetings with the concerned functionaries of the regulated entity and seek any record / document available with the regulated entity that are nec

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish all records and documents sought by the internal ombudsman to enable expeditious resolution of the complaints without any undue delay
controls.control_description:
The regulated
entity shall furnish all records and documents sought by the Internal Ombudsman to
enable expeditious resolution of the complaints without any undue delay.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish all records and documents sought by the internal ombudsman to enable expeditious resolution of the complaints without any undue delay

controls.control_objective: To ensure , on a quarterly basis, analyse the pattern of all complaints received against the regulated entity, such as entity-wise (for cics), product-wise, category-wise, consumer group-wise, geographical location-wise, etc., and may provide inputs to the regulated entity for policy intervention
controls.control_description:
(6) The Internal Ombudsman shall, on a quarterly basis, analyse the pattern of all
complaints
received against the regulated entity, such as entity-wise (for CICs), product-wise,
category-wise, consumer group-wise, geographical location-wise, etc., and may provide
inputs to the regulated entity for policy intervention, if so warranted.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to , on a quarterly basis, analyse the pattern of all complaints received against the regulated entity, such as entity-wise (for cics), product-wise, category-wise, consumer group-wise, geographical location-wise, etc., and may provide inputs to the regulated entity for policy intervention

controls.control_objective: To ensure represent the regulated entity in legal cases before any court or fora or authority
controls.control_description:
(7) The Internal Ombudsman shall not represent the regulated entity in legal cases before
any court or fora or authority.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to represent the regulated entity in legal cases before any court or fora or authority

controls.control_objective: To ensure be kept on record
controls.control_description:
(8) In cases of conciliation, where the decision of the Internal Ombudsman is accepted
by the complainant, a statement showing the terms of agreement duly signed by the
complainant, shall be kept on record.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be kept on record

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish periodic reports (including the analysis of complaints) on his / her activities to the committee of the board handling customer service and pr
controls.control_description:
Board Oversight
(1) The Internal Ombudsman shall furnish periodic reports (including the analysis of
complaints) on his / her activities to the Committee of the Board handling customer service
and protection, preferably at quarterly intervals, but not less than half yearly intervals.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish periodic reports (including the analysis of complaints) on his / her activities to the committee of the board handling customer service and pr

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a system for discussion of cases, in which the decision of the internal ombudsman has been rejected by the regulated entity, by the custo
controls.control_description:
Regulated entities shall put in place a system for discussion of cases, in which the
decision of the Internal Ombudsman has been rejected by the regulated entity, by the
Customer Service Committee / Consumer Protection Committee of the Board of the
regulated entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a system for discussion of cases, in which the decision of the internal ombudsman has been rejected by the regulated entity, by the custo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be done with the approval of the competent authority as defined under clause 3(1)(c) of these directions
controls.control_description:
The rejection of the decision taken by the Internal Ombudsman shall be
done with the approval of the Competent Authority as defined under clause 3(1)(c) of
these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be done with the approval of the competent authority as defined under clause 3(1)(c) of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be designated as an ex-officio member or a permanent invitee to the meetings of the committee of the board of regulated entity handling customer servi
controls.control_description:
(3) The Internal Ombudsman shall be designated as an ex-officio member or a permanent
invitee to the meetings of the Committee of the Board of regulated entity handling
customer service and protection.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be designated as an ex-officio member or a permanent invitee to the meetings of the committee of the board of regulated entity handling customer servi

controls.control_objective: To ensure formulate a standard operating procedure (sop) approved by the committee of the board handling customer service and protection and establish a fully a
controls.control_description:
Procedure for Complaint Redress by Internal Ombudsman
(1) The regulated entity shall formulate a Standard Operating Procedure (SOP) approved
by the Committee of the Board handling Customer Service and Protection and establish
a fully automated Complaints Management Software wherein all complaints that are partly
or wholly rejected by the regulated entity's internal grievance redress mechanism are
auto-escalated to the Internal Ombudsman within 20 days of receipt, for a final decision.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to formulate a standard operating procedure (sop) approved by the committee of the board handling customer service and protection and establish a fully a

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that the final decision is communicated to the complainant within a period of 30 days from the date of receipt of complaint by the regulated en
controls.control_description:
(2) The Internal Ombudsman and regulated entity shall ensure that the final decision is
communicated to the complainant within a period of 30 days from the date of receipt of
complaint by the regulated entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that the final decision is communicated to the complainant within a period of 30 days from the date of receipt of complaint by the regulated en

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide read-only access to their complaint management software so that all complaints are accessible to the internal ombudsman who shall follow up ca
controls.control_description:
(3) The regulated entity shall provide read-only access to their Complaint Management
Software so that all complaints are accessible to the Internal Ombudsman who shall
follow up cases of delayed escalation with the concerned department in the regulated
entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to provide read-only access to their complaint management software so that all complaints are accessible to the internal ombudsman who shall follow up ca

controls.control_objective: To ensure also provide access to the internal ombudsman in its complaint management software, for adding his / her decisions on complaints escalated to the inte
controls.control_description:
The regulated entity shall also provide access to the Internal Ombudsman in its
Complaint Management Software, for adding his / her decisions on complaints escalated
to the Internal Ombudsman.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to also provide access to the internal ombudsman in its complaint management software, for adding his / her decisions on complaints escalated to the inte

controls.control_objective: To ensure also have 'read-only' access to the reserve bank's complaints management system to enable the internal ombudsman to keep track of (i) the cases forwar
controls.control_description:
(4) The Internal Ombudsman shall also have 'read-only' access to the Reserve Bank's
Complaints Management System to enable the Internal Ombudsman to keep track of (i)
the cases forwarded by the RBI Ombudsman to the regulated entity, (ii) decisions of the
RBI Ombudsman thereon, and (iii) where applicable, the decision of the Appellate
Authority, under the Reserve Bank - Integrated Ombudsman Scheme.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also have 'read-only' access to the reserve bank's complaints management system to enable the internal ombudsman to keep track of (i) the cases forwar

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek read-only access for the internal ombudsman from the consumer education and protection department of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Once the Internal
Ombudsman has joined the regulated entity, the regulated entity shall seek read-only
access for the Internal Ombudsman from the Consumer Education and Protection
Department of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek read-only access for the internal ombudsman from the consumer education and protection department of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish all records / documents sought by the internal ombudsman to enable him / her to redress / resolve customer grievances expeditiously
controls.control_description:
(5) The regulated entity shall furnish all records / documents sought by the Internal
Ombudsman to enable him / her to redress / resolve customer grievances expeditiously.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish all records / documents sought by the internal ombudsman to enable him / her to redress / resolve customer grievances expeditiously

controls.control_objective: To ensure be binding on the regulated entity
controls.control_description:
(6) The decision of Internal Ombudsman shall be binding on the regulated entity, except
in cases where the regulated entity has obtained approval for disagreeing with such
decision as stated in sub-clause (8) below.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be binding on the regulated entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure explicitly state the fact that the complaint has been examined by the internal ombudsman and for the reasons stated in the reply, the decision of the
controls.control_description:
(7) Where the Internal Ombudsman upholds the decision of the regulated entity to reject
or partly reject the complaint, the reply to the complainant should explicitly state the fact
that the complaint has been examined by the Internal Ombudsman and for the reasons
stated in the reply, the decision of the regulated entity has been upheld.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to explicitly state the fact that the complaint has been examined by the internal ombudsman and for the reasons stated in the reply, the decision of the

controls.control_objective: To ensure explicitly state the fact that the complaint was examined by the internal ombudsman and the decision of the regulated entity was overruled by the inte
controls.control_description:
In such cases, the reply to the complainant shall
explicitly state the fact that the complaint was examined by the Internal Ombudsman and
the decision of the regulated entity was overruled by the Internal Ombudsman in favour
of the complainant;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to explicitly state the fact that the complaint was examined by the internal ombudsman and the decision of the regulated entity was overruled by the inte

controls.control_objective: To ensure be communicated to the complainant within 7 days of communication of the decision of the internal ombudsman on the case to the regulated entity
controls.control_description:
Such decision
must be communicated to the complainant within 7 days of communication of the decision
of the Internal Ombudsman on the case to the regulated entity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be communicated to the complainant within 7 days of communication of the decision of the internal ombudsman on the case to the regulated entity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subsequently reviewed on a quarterly basis by the customer service committee of the board or the board of the regulated entity as indicated under c
controls.control_description:
All such cases shall be
subsequently reviewed on a quarterly basis by the Customer Service Committee of the
Board or the Board of the regulated entity as indicated under clause 12(1) of these
Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subsequently reviewed on a quarterly basis by the customer service committee of the board or the board of the regulated entity as indicated under c

controls.control_objective: To ensure necessarily advise the complainant, as part of the reply, that he/she can approach the rbi ombudsman for redress (excluding complaints against regulat
controls.control_description:
(9) For complaints that are fully or partly rejected even after examination by the Internal
Ombudsman, the regulated entity shall necessarily advise the complainant, as part of the
reply, that he/she can approach the RBI Ombudsman for redress (excluding complaints
against regulated entities not covered under the RB-IOS, 2021) along with complete
details of the complaint.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to necessarily advise the complainant, as part of the reply, that he/she can approach the rbi ombudsman for redress (excluding complaints against regulat

controls.control_objective: To ensure mention physical address of the centralised receipt and processing centre2, as well as the address of reserve bank's complaint management system porta
controls.control_description:
The regulated entity in its reply shall mention physical address
of the Centralised Receipt and Processing Centre2, as well as the address of Reserve
Bank's Complaint Management System portal for online filing of customer complaints
(https://cms.rbi.org.in).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mention physical address of the centralised receipt and processing centre2, as well as the address of reserve bank's complaint management system porta

controls.control_objective: To ensure be mandatorily included in the information submitted by the regulated entity to the rbi ombudsman, while furnishing documents related to the complaint
controls.control_description:
(10) The decision of the Internal Ombudsman shall be mandatorily included in the
information submitted by the regulated entity to the RBI Ombudsman, while furnishing
documents related to the complaints received in the Office of the RBI Ombudsman.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be mandatorily included in the information submitted by the regulated entity to the rbi ombudsman, while furnishing documents related to the complaint

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain the views of internal ombudsman and include the internal ombudsman's views in its submissions to the rbi ombudsman
controls.control_description:
2 Centralized Receipt and Processing Centre (CRPC) Reserve Bank of India, Central Vista, Sector 17, Chandigarh - 160 017
(11) In cases where the complainant has approached the RBI Ombudsman before the
Internal Ombudsman has examined the complaint, the regulated entity should obtain the
views of Internal Ombudsman and include the Internal Ombudsman's views in its
submissions to the RBI Ombudsman.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain the views of internal ombudsman and include the internal ombudsman's views in its submissions to the rbi ombudsman

controls.control_objective: To ensure use the analysis of complaints handled by internal ombudsman in their training programmes / conferences to raise awareness about the pattern of compla
controls.control_description:
(12) The regulated entity shall use the analysis of complaints handled by Internal
Ombudsman in their training programmes / conferences to raise awareness about the
pattern of complaints including the root causes, remedial measures, etc., among the
frontline staff, in order to evolve consistency in handling of complaints.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to use the analysis of complaints handled by internal ombudsman in their training programmes / conferences to raise awareness about the pattern of compla

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be involved for such trainings
controls.control_description:
The Internal
Ombudsman may also be involved for such trainings, where necessary.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be involved for such trainings

controls.control_objective: To ensure also analyse the number of cases where there is substantive difference between the decisions of the internal ombudsman vis-à-vis those given by the rb
controls.control_description:
(13) While assessing the performance of the Internal Ombudsman, in addition to the level
of pendency and work done by the Internal Ombudsman towards developing uniformity
across the regulated entity in the redress of complaints, the regulated entity shall also
analyse the number of cases where there is substantive difference between the decisions
of the Internal Ombudsman vis-à-vis those given by the RBI Ombudsman subsequently.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also analyse the number of cases where there is substantive difference between the decisions of the internal ombudsman vis-à-vis those given by the rb

controls.control_objective: To ensure widely disseminate the guidelines / instructions regarding these directions among their staff while communicating the appointment of internal ombudsma
controls.control_description:
(14) The regulated entity shall widely disseminate the guidelines / instructions regarding
these Directions among their staff while communicating the appointment of Internal
Ombudsman in the organization (all branches and administrative offices).
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to widely disseminate the guidelines / instructions regarding these directions among their staff while communicating the appointment of internal ombudsma

controls.control_objective: To ensure provide the contact details of the internal ombudsman in the public domain as the internal ombudsman shall not handle complaints received directly fro
controls.control_description:
(15) The regulated entity shall not provide the contact details of the Internal Ombudsman
in the public domain as the Internal Ombudsman shall not handle complaints received
directly from the customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to provide the contact details of the internal ombudsman in the public domain as the internal ombudsman shall not handle complaints received directly fro

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a part of the risk assessment and supervisory review undertaken by the department of supervision of the reserve bank in case the regulated entity i
controls.control_description:
Supervisory Oversight
(1) The areas relating to customer service and customer grievance redress, as well as
the implementation of these Directions, shall be a part of the risk assessment and
supervisory review undertaken by the Department of Supervision of the Reserve Bank in
case the regulated entity is a bank, NBFC and CIC and the Department of Payment and
Settlement Systems of the Reserve Bank in case the regulated entity is an NBSP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be a part of the risk assessment and supervisory review undertaken by the department of supervision of the reserve bank in case the regulated entity i

controls.control_objective: To ensure review the cases where the decision of the internal ombudsman has not been accepted by the regulated entity and the aggrieved complainant approaches t
controls.control_description:
(2) Consumer Education and Protection Department of the Reserve Bank may review the
cases where the decision of the Internal Ombudsman has not been accepted by the
regulated entity and the aggrieved complainant approaches the RBI Ombudsman, for
assessing the effectiveness of the internal grievance redress mechanism of the regulated
entity and initiating corrective actions as it may deem fit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to review the cases where the decision of the internal ombudsman has not been accepted by the regulated entity and the aggrieved complainant approaches t

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a system of periodic reporting of information to consumer education and protection department, central office, reserve bank of india, on
controls.control_description:
Reporting to Reserve Bank
(1) The regulated entity shall put in place a system of periodic reporting of information to
Consumer Education and Protection Department, Central Office, Reserve Bank of India,
on a quarterly and annual basis as per formats provided in the Annexure.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place a system of periodic reporting of information to consumer education and protection department, central office, reserve bank of india, on

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted on or before the 10th day of the month following the quarter/year for which they are due
controls.control_description:
These reports
shall be submitted on or before the 10th day of the month following the quarter/year for
which they are due.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted on or before the 10th day of the month following the quarter/year for which they are due

controls.control_objective: To ensure , within five working days of appointment of the internal ombudsman or deputy internal ombudsman, furnish the details of the official so appointed to
controls.control_description:
(2) The regulated entity shall, within five working days of appointment of the Internal
Ombudsman or Deputy Internal Ombudsman, furnish the details of the official so
appointed to the Consumer Education and Protection Department, Central Office,
Reserve Bank of India (iocepd@rbi.org.in) in the following format:
1.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to , within five working days of appointment of the internal ombudsman or deputy internal ombudsman, furnish the details of the official so appointed to

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed to have been made under these directions
controls.control_description:
(2) All appointments under the repealed circulars or instructions given in sub-clause (1)
prior to the coming into effect of these Directions, shall be deemed to have been made
under these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed to have been made under these directions
